evals.name: MCP action guides user to portal
evals.prompt: Use the add-action skill to add an MCP server action for searching Microsoft Learn documentation. Provide the full step-by-step instructions for how to do this.

evals.name: Connector action guides user to portal
evals.prompt: Use the add-action skill to add a Teams connector action that sends a message to a channel. Provide the full step-by-step instructions for how to do this.

evals.name: MCP action mentions edit-action for customization
evals.prompt: Use the add-action skill to add a custom MCP server action to the agent. Provide the full step-by-step instructions and explain how to customize the action after adding it.
